system.resetAllSettingsDesc: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This will clear all saved settings and restore default states. ryOS will restart after reset.
system.formatFileSystemDesc: Are you sure you want to format the file system? This will permanently delete all documents (except sample documents), images, and custom wallpapers. ryOS will restart after format.

errorBoundaries.appDescription: Relaunch it to open a fresh window, or quit this crashed window. Other open apps will keep running.
errorBoundaries.desktopDescription: Reload ryOS to restore the Dock, Desktop, and menu bar.

assistant.label: {{name}} the desktop assistant
assistant.emptyBubble: Hi! Click me anytime you need help.
assistant.rateLimited: Phew, I need a little break! Try me again in a bit — or sign in for more chats. 😴
assistant.genericError: Oops, something tangled me up. Try again in a moment! 📎

greetings.hello: Hi there! I'm {{name}}, your desktop assistant. Click me if you need anything! 👋
greetings.help: It looks like you're using ryOS! Need a hand with anything? I'm {{name}}, happy to help. 📎
greetings.looksLike: Hello! {{name}} here — I can open apps, play music, or answer questions. Just ask! ✨
greetings.tip: Hey! I'm {{name}}. Tip: you can drag me anywhere, and I'll snap to your windows and dock. 🪄

auth.setPasswordRequiredDescription: You need to set a password before signing out to ensure you can recover your account. Would you like to set a password now?

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
changePassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password
changePassword.toastSetDescription: You can now use your password to recover your account

recovery.title: Reset Password
recovery.description: Send a reset code to your recovery methods, then choose a new password.
recovery.codeSent: If an account matches, a reset code has been sent.
recovery.identifierRequired: Enter your user name or email
recovery.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
recovery.genericError: Couldn't reset password. Check your code and try again.
recovery.successDescription: You're now signed in with your new password.

deleteAccount.description: This permanently deletes your account, password, recovery email, linked Telegram, and synced data. This can't be undone.
